quoteFirst: “The little fellow ate his supper with his grandfather at
quoteLast: . In fact, the three of us sat at that table over there, and tried to make the best of the meal they prepared for us here in the plant. It’s been the habit of little Reuben to be put to bed early, and so Mr. Campertown took him off immediately we were done.
